reviews.comment:
Es un clasico del ACA en el medio de un viaje largo, como ir al sur. Atencion muy amable; servicio de combustibles y para los socios, tienen cabañas para pernoctar. El restaurante es excelente! La comida riquisima y buenos precios. Tienen tarjeta de credito. Limpieza muy buena.

(Translated by Google)
It's a classic ACA stop in the middle of a long trip, like heading south. Very friendly service; they have fuel available and cabins for members to stay overnight. The restaurant is excellent! Delicious food and good prices. They accept credit cards. Very clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTa2J6TkRnEAE

reviews.comment:
Miserable el desayuno. Ni una manteca para las tostadas y las medialunas malisimas. Además no venden hielo. El domingo como los dueños no están apenas atienden. No volveré!

(Translated by Google)
The breakfast was awful. Not even butter for the toast, and the croissants were terrible. They don't even sell ice. On Sundays, since the owners aren't there, they barely serve customers. I won't be back!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTZ2NyUl9nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Compramos bebidas en el lugar y no nos dejaron consumir un sanguchito en la mesa. Ni que fuera el Sheraton.

(Translated by Google)
We bought drinks there, but they wouldn't let us have a sandwich at the table. It's not like it's the Sheraton.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTN3NMeE9BEAE
